name: Baidu Qianfan
description: Registers Baidu Qianfan chat models as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider using Qianfan API-key auth.

env.description: Fallback Baidu Qianfan API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate fallback Baidu Qianfan API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting or QIANFAN_API_KEY is configured.
Legacy fallback Baidu API key used for Qianfan inference when no more-specific key is configured.

settings.label: Qianfan API key
settings.description: Baidu Qianfan API key used for inference. Falls back to QIANFAN_API_KEY, BAIDU_QIANFAN_API_KEY, then BAIDU_API_KEY.

settings.label: Qianfan app ID
settings.description: Optional Baidu Qianfan appid header value for applications that require app routing.

providers.name: Baidu Qianfan
providers.description: Registers a conservative static Baidu Qianfan chat catalog through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
